title: Tech Is So 2020; How To Own The Future's Fastest Growing Sector
text: When you think fast-growing S&P 500 sectors, tech probably pops to mind. But new estimates show another sector will take over.

title: Hilton Announces Third Quarter 2022 Earnings Release Date
text: MCLEAN, Va.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Hilton Worldwide Holdings Inc. (NYSE: HLT) will report third quarter 2022 financial results before the stock market opens on Wednesday, October 26, 2022, followed by a conference call at 10 a.m. EDT. Christopher J. Nassetta, Hilton's president & chief executive officer, and Kevin Jacobs, Hilton's chief financial officer & president, global development, will discuss the company's performance and lead a question-and-answer session. title: Hilton Worldwide Holdings: An Analysis Of Seasonal Revenue Trends
text: Hilton Worldwide Holdings has seen a strong rebound in overall RevPAR. RevPAR across the Waldorf Astoria brand has been notably strong during the autumn and winter quarters.

title: Here's Why You Should Retain Hilton (HLT) Stock For Now
text: Hilton (HLT) emphasizes on expanding its luxury line-up of hotels to drive growth. However, a decline in RevPAR from pre-pandemic levels is a concern.

title: Hilton and Voyager Space to Design Crew Lodging and Hospitality Suites Aboard Starlab
text: Voyager Space Names Hilton Official Hotel Partner to Elevate the Guest Experience in Space DENVER and MCLEAN, Va. , Sept. 20, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Voyager Space ("Voyager"), a global leader in space exploration, today announced Hilton will be the official hotel partner of Starlab , Voyager's planned free-flying commercial space station.

title: Amazon, Hilton And PepsiCo Among Nearly Four Dozen Major Companies That Commit To Hiring 22,000 Refugees
text: Chobani billionaire Hamdi Ulukaya makes an economic case for big U.S. companies to hire refugees for blue- and white-collar jobs.

title: Hilton to design astronaut suites, facilities for Voyager's private space station Starlab
text: Hotel giant Hilton has signed on to design astronaut facilities for the private space station Starlab.
